title: Bow and Crossbow Charge Indicator
description: Add a custom texture for every stage of pulling back a bow/crossbow for better visibility
body:
**The BEST bow and crossbow indicator texture pack**

This pack features:
> 3 new textures for the 3 bow and crossbow pulling stages:
- Green for the first stage
- Yellow for the second stage
- Red for the third stage

**How to use:**
- Download this recource pack and drop it into your AppData/Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks folder
- Select this pack in the recource packs tab in the pause menu
- Enjoy the pack!

**Join my discord if you want to support me :)** https://discord.gg/MQfnkB3pNQ
